# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Target - Build, Test, Comment

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, ready_for_review]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write

concurrency:
  group: pr-target-ci-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build_test_and_comment:
    if: ${{ !github.event.pull_request.draft }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code (safe ref)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: refs/pull/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}/merge
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        id: build
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Test
        id: test
        run: npm test
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Prepare comment body
        id: comment
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          BUILD_STATUS="✅ success"
          if [ "${{ steps.build.outcome }}" != "success" ]; then
            BUILD_STATUS="❌ failure"
          fi

          TEST_STATUS="✅ success"
          if [ "${{ steps.test.outcome }}" != "success" ]; then
            TEST_STATUS="❌ failure"
          fi

          RUN_URL="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          SHA="${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}"
          PR="${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"

          cat > body.txt <<EOF
          ### CI results for PR #${PR}

          - Commit: \`${SHA}\`
          - Build: ${BUILD_STATUS}
          - Tests: ${TEST_STATUS}

          Workflow run: ${RUN_URL}
          EOF

      - name: Post (or update) PR comment with results
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const fs = require('fs');
            const body = fs.readFileSync('body.txt', 'utf8');
            const owner = context.repo.owner;
            const repo = context.repo.repo;
            const issue_number = context.payload.pull_request.number;

            const marker = '<!-- pr-target-ci-results -->';
            const finalBody = `${marker}\n${body}`;

            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner, repo, issue_number, per_page: 100
            });

            const existing = comments.find(c => c.user?.type === 'Bot' && c.body?.includes(marker));

            if (existing) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner, repo, comment_id: existing.id, body: finalBody
              });
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner, repo, issue_number, body: finalBody
              });
            }

      - name: Fail job if tests failed
        if: ${{ steps.test.outcome != 'success' }}
        run: exit 1
